ict_profile: Monday Gap-Up → Power of 3 Setup (potential accumulation)
entry: TBD — waiting for pullback to 61.8-70.5% retracement (29,794-30,018) or NY AM KZ confirmation

three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: D1 structure: 3 consecutive HH+HL days (Jun 11-15). Strong recovery from Jun 9 low (+2,043pts, +7.2%). Monday gap up +327pts from Friday close. Price at 79.4% Fib retracement of crash — deep premium approaching pre-crash ATH supply (30,776). Bullish momentum but extended.
three_layer_analysis.l2_h4: H4: 3 of 4 candles bullish today. Strong displacement from gap open (29,982) to session high (30,318). Bullish FVG at 29,744-29,957 (today's gap) — price holding above. Bearish FVG at 30,214-30,365 from crash session — partially filled. H4 dealing range same as D1 (28,205-30,318). Price at 96.6% of range = extreme premium.
three_layer_analysis.l3_m15: M15: Rally from 29,982 to 30,318 during London session, now consolidating/pulling back to 30,242. Bullish OB at 30,166-30,182 (London session). Bearish reaction at 30,318 high (4 consecutive bearish M15 candles from 30,302 high to 30,212 low before bounce). Kill Zone: London closed, NY AM KZ (08:30-11:00 NY) upcoming — key window for continuation or reversal.

smt_divergence.details: NAS100 HL (28,204.7→28,248.7) + US500 LL (7,243.1→7,229.3) at swing lows. NAS100 held its low while US500 swept — NAS100 is the stronger index.

weekly_profile.last_week: Classic Wednesday Reversal — bearish Mon-Tue, massive bullish reversal Wed (+977.9), continuation Thu-Fri
weekly_profile.this_week: Monday gap up +327pts. If Monday establishes weekly low → continuation bullish. If Monday establishes weekly high → Tuesday/Wednesday reversal bearish. Watch for Power of 3 pattern (Accumulation Mon → Manipulation Tue → Distribution Wed-Thu).

reasoning: NAS100 shows strong bullish momentum with 3 consecutive HH+HL D1 candles, Monday gap up +327pts, and bullish SMT divergence at swing lows (NAS100 held while US500 swept). However, price is at 79.4% Fib retracement of the crash — deep premium territory approaching the pre-crash ATH at 30,776 (major supply). The risk/reward for new longs at current levels is poor. Preferred strategy: wait for pullback to 61.8-70.5% retracement zone (29,794-30,018) for better entry, or wait for NY AM Kill Zone (08:30-11:00 NY) to confirm direction. If price breaks above 30,318 (today's high) with volume → continuation to 30,776 ATH test. If price rejects and breaks below 30,018 (70.5% Fib) → potential double-top/reversal setup targeting gap fill at 29,655.
risk_factors: Price at 79.4% retracement — deep premium, limited upside before major supply
Pre-crash ATH 30,776 is major resistance — smart money may distribute here
No NY AM Kill Zone confirmation yet (08:30-11:00 NY pending)
Low H4 volume (0.36x average) — rally lacks conviction
Monday gap could reverse (gap fill to 29,655 is common)

scenarios.bullish: Break above 30,318 → target 30,465 (Jun 4 close supply), then 30,776 ATH. Entry on retest of 30,200-30,250 with SL below 30,018.
scenarios.bearish: Rejection at 30,318 → target gap fill 29,655, then 29,491 (50% Fib). Entry on M15 bearish displacement below 30,166 OB with SL above 30,318.
scenarios.neutral: Consolidation 30,018-30,318 until NY AM KZ provides directional catalyst.
